title: CDNA3 WGMFMA global-to-LDS staging GEMM Skeleton

problem.summary: Create a CDNA3-specific GEMM task skeleton that records WGMFMA/global-to-LDS staging as the intended extension surface while keeping a portable scalar baseline.
outputs: C = A * B with FP32 accumulation
constraints: WGMFMA/global-to-LDS staging path is TODO and should target gfx950 explicitly
Composable Kernel/CK Tile is the reference extension path
Record gfx942 versus gfx950 metadata separately

verification.method: Compare with CPU FP32 accumulation over rounded half inputs.

curation.notes: This skeleton exists so agents do not mix CDNA3 WGMFMA/global-to-LDS staging claims into generic rocWMMA tasks. No GPU benchmarking is attached.
